sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Target vs. Costco: Which Discount Retail Stock Offers More Upside Now?
feed.summary: This article compares Target (TGT) and Costco (COST) as discount retail stock investments, analyzing their business models, financial performance, and future outlook. While Target shows progress in digital initiatives and operational improvements, it faces near-term headwinds from cautious consumer spending on discretionary items. Costco, with its strong membership-based model and consistent operational efficiency, is presented as the stronger investment candidate for stable, long-term growth.

feed.title: Arista Networks ANET Stock News: AI Networking Tailwinds, Analyst Targets, and What to Watch Before the Next Market Open
feed.summary: This article provides an in-depth look at Arista Networks (ANET) as it heads into year-end 2025, highlighting its position as a key AI infrastructure and hyperscale data-center beneficiary. It discusses the company's strong financial performance, product catalysts like 800G networking, the VeloCloud acquisition for enterprise expansion, and current analyst forecasts. The piece also covers potential risks such as customer concentration and competition, and offers guidance for investors before the next market open.

feed.title: Merck Stock (MRK) News and Forecasts: FDA Fast-Track Vouchers, TrumpRx Pricing Deal, and Cidara Acquisition in Focus Ahead of the Next Market Session
feed.summary: Merck & Co., Inc. (MRK) is navigating a complex landscape marked by new drug pricing deals, FDA fast-track approvals for two key therapies (enlicitide and sac-TMT), and the strategic acquisition of Cidara Therapeutics. These developments come as Merck prepares for the eventual loss of exclusivity for its blockbuster drug Keytruda, aiming to diversify its portfolio and sustain growth. Analysts are cautiously optimistic, with some raising price targets based on the potential of Merck's pipeline and strategic moves to offset future revenue impacts.

feed.title: Analysts Maintain Positive Outlook on AMD With China Demand as a Catalyst
feed.summary: Analysts maintain a positive outlook on Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) due to the potential resumption of chip shipments to China. Raymond James estimates AMD could see a significant revenue and EPS upside in 2026 if US export approvals continue. While Wall Street has a consensus "Buy" rating on AMD, some analysts suggest other AI stocks may offer greater upside with less risk.

feed.title: AT&T Stock (NYSE: T): Latest News, Dividend Update, Analyst Forecasts, and What to Watch Before the Next Trading Session
feed.summary: This article provides a comprehensive overview of AT&T (NYSE: T) stock, focusing on its investment case, recent performance, and key factors for investors. It highlights AT&T's strategy of convergence through fiber and wireless, its latest quarterly financials, and the impact of interest rates and market dynamics. The article also delves into four key drivers: convergence momentum, fiber expansion, spectrum strategy, and capital returns, alongside recent headlines, dividend updates, and analyst forecasts.

feed.title: JPMorgan Confident in Apple (AAPL) as iPhone 17 Demand-Supply Reaches Parity
feed.summary: JPMorgan has reiterated its "Overweight" rating for Apple (AAPL) with a $305 price target, noting that iPhone 17 lead times have moderated, indicating that demand and supply are reaching a balance. This parity is expected to alleviate concerns about supply constraints heading into F2Q26 and drive higher iPhone units and revenue through the rest of the product cycle.

feed.title: Mosaic Signs Deal to Sell Carlsbad Potash Business
feed.summary: The Mosaic Company has agreed to sell its Carlsbad, New Mexico potash operations to International Minerals Carlsbad, LLC for $30 million. This strategic move allows Mosaic to concentrate on its core potash assets in Saskatchewan, Canada, while International Minerals Carlsbad expands its presence in the U.S. potash market, ensuring continuity for employees, customers, and suppliers. The deal is expected to close in the first half of 2026.

feed.title: Exxon Mobil (XOM) Raises its 2030 Corporate Plan Outlook
feed.summary: Exxon Mobil Corporation (XOM) has increased its 2030 corporate plan outlook, raising its earnings growth forecast to $25 billion and cash flow growth to $35 billion for the 2024-30 period. The company also aims for 5.5 million oil-equivalent barrels of production per day and plans to achieve $20 billion in structural cost savings by 2030. These adjustments are expected to generate significant surplus cash flow for increased shareholder returns.

feed.title: First Trust Indxx Medical Devices ETF (BATS:MDEV) Trading 0.9% Higher – Still a Buy?
feed.summary: The First Trust Indxx Medical Devices ETF (MDEV) experienced a 0.9% increase in trading, reaching $21.09, though trading volume was down 60%. The ETF has a market cap of $2.11 million and a P/E ratio of 29.75. Jane Street Group LLC recently boosted its stake in MDEV by 38.2%, now owning 20.81% of the company's stock.

feed.title: Chevron (CVX) Maintains Presence in Venezuela Despite Tensions
feed.summary: Chevron Corporation (NYSE: CVX) continues to operate in Venezuela as the largest foreign investor, despite US sanctions and geopolitical tensions, due to a special US license. The company is preparing to ship approximately 1 million barrels of Venezuelan crude and has sold at least 10 cargoes for US delivery in January. Chevron's output in Venezuela, around 250,000 barrels per day, contributes significantly to its global production, aiding its goal of over 10% annual growth in adjusted free cash flow and EPS through 2030.

feed.title: MercadoLibre (MELI) Stock News: Investment-Grade Upgrade, Brazil Free Shipping Push, and What to Watch Before Monday’s Open
feed.summary: MercadoLibre (MELI) is heading into the end of 2025 with significant developments, including an investment-grade credit rating upgrade, aggressive free shipping expansion in Brazil, and a looming CEO transition. Investors are focused on how these factors will impact the company's growth, margins, and valuation, especially with thin year-end liquidity amplifying market reactions. Moody's upgraded MELI to investment grade, potentially lowering borrowing costs, while its Brazil strategy shows accelerated growth but compressed margins due to competitive free shipping.

feed.title: Slide Insurance (NASDAQ:SLDE) & Presurance (NASDAQ:PRHI) Financial Comparison
feed.summary: This article compares the financial performance of Slide Insurance (NASDAQ:SLDE) and Presurance (NASDAQ:PRHI) across several key metrics. Slide Insurance emerges as the better business, outperforming Presurance in valuation, earnings, profitability, and analyst recommendations. The analysis suggests Slide Insurance has stronger growth prospects and a more favorable outlook from market analysts.

feed.title: Critical Analysis: Allied World Assurance (OTCMKTS:AWHHF) and Presurance (NASDAQ:PRHI)
feed.summary: This article compares Allied World Assurance (OTCMKTS:AWHHF) and Presurance (NASDAQ:PRHI), two financial services companies, across several key metrics including analyst ratings, earnings, valuation, profitability, and institutional/insider ownership. It concludes that Allied World Assurance performs better than Presurance in 5 out of 8 factors analyzed. Detailed company descriptions for both Presurance (Conifer Holdings, Inc.) and Allied World Assurance are provided.

feed.title: Ishares Iboxx $ High Yield Corporate Bond Etf Options Spot-On: On December 26th, 56,318 Contracts Were Traded, With 8.09 Million Open Interest
feed.summary: On December 26th, active options trading was observed for the iShares iBoxx $ High Yield Corporate Bond ETF (HYG.US), with a total of 56,318 options contracts traded. Call options slightly outnumbered put options, accounting for 52.51% of transactions. The open interest for HYG.US options reached approximately 8.09 million contracts, representing 82.03% of the average over the past 30 trading days.

feed.title: Wall Street Zen Upgrades Marine Products (NYSE:MPX) to Hold
feed.summary: Wall Street Zen has upgraded Marine Products (NYSE:MPX) to a "hold" rating, while Weiss Ratings reaffirmed a "sell (d+)" rating, leaving the consensus analyst rating at "Sell." The company recently reported quarterly EPS of $0.07 against an expected $0.10 and revenue of $53.15 million versus an estimated $54.8 million, resulting in a 2.1% share price drop. Despite the mixed ratings, institutional ownership has increased, with Rhumbline Advisers notably raising its stake.

feed.title: Vail Resorts (NYSE:MTN) Rating Increased to Hold at Wall Street Zen
feed.summary: Wall Street Zen has upgraded Vail Resorts (NYSE:MTN) from a "sell" to a "hold" rating, contributing to a consensus "Hold" rating from analysts with an average price target of $176.30 against a current price of $140.27. The company recently reported Q1 EPS of ($5.20), beating estimates, and revenue of $271.03 million, a slight miss but up 4.1% year-over-year. Insider transactions also show CFO Angela A. Korch increasing her stake in the company.

Xylem surpassed quarterly expectations with $1.37 EPS and $2.27 billion revenue, also setting strong FY2025 guidance. Despite insider share sales, institutional investors hold a significant 87.96% of the stock.

feed.title: PACCAR (NASDAQ:PCAR) Upgraded by Wall Street Zen to "Hold" Rating

PACCAR recently reported mixed quarterly results, missing EPS expectations but beating revenue estimates, with a year-over-year revenue decline of 20.7%. Company insiders and hedge funds have also made recent adjustments to their positions in the stock.

feed.title: Henry Schein, Inc. (NASDAQ:HSIC) Receives Average Recommendation of "Hold" from Analysts
feed.summary: Henry Schein, Inc. (NASDAQ:HSIC) currently holds an average "Hold" recommendation from 14 analysts, with a 12-month price target of $76.92. Despite the consensus, some analysts have issued bullish revisions, including an "outperform" rating from Evercore ISI with a $90 target and an "overweight" initiation from Barclays at $86. Institutional investors hold approximately 96.62% of the company, with significant recent purchases from firms like Ameriprise, Norges Bank, Schroder, and Bank of America.

feed.title: Alphabet Inc. (NASDAQ:GOOG) Receives Consensus Recommendation of "Buy" from Analysts
feed.summary: Alphabet Inc. (NASDAQ:GOOG) has received a consensus "Buy" recommendation from 41 brokerages, with an average 1-year target price of $313.0357. This positive outlook is supported by recent earnings that beat expectations and strong growth in AI and cloud services. However, a cautionary note is the recent insider selling by senior executives, including CEO Sundar Pichai, totaling approximately $64 million in the last 90 days.

feed.title: Kosmos Energy Ltd. (NYSE:KOS) Given Consensus Recommendation of "Hold" by Brokerages
feed.summary: Kosmos Energy Ltd. (NYSE:KOS) has received a consensus "Hold" recommendation from eight brokerages, with an average 12-month price target of $2.2917. Recent analyst target cuts from firms like Mizuho and Goldman Sachs, alongside the stock trading near its 52-week low and reporting negative financials, reflect a mixed and weakening outlook despite significant institutional ownership. The company, an independent oil and gas exploration firm, has a high debt-to-equity ratio and missed its recent earnings per share and revenue estimates.

feed.title: Verizon (VZ) Stock News Today: Dividend, Frontier Deal Updates, Analyst Forecasts — and What to Watch Before Monday’s Open

feed.title: Hovnanian Enterprises (NYSE:HOV) Downgraded to Sell Rating by Wall Street Zen

The stock's performance reflects these concerns, trading below its 50- and 200-day moving averages.

feed.title: Las Vegas Sands (NYSE:LVS) Lowered to "Buy" Rating by Wall Street Zen

Despite the insider activity, several firms have raised their price targets for LVS into the mid-$60s.

feed.title: Federal Realty Investment Trust (NYSE:FRT) Upgraded to Hold at Wall Street Zen
feed.summary: Wall Street Zen upgraded Federal Realty Investment Trust (NYSE:FRT) from "sell" to "hold," though the overall analyst consensus remains "Moderate Buy" with an average price target of $109.30. Various other research firms have issued mixed ratings and price targets for FRT, reflecting a diverse outlook on the real estate investment trust.

feed.summary: Bank of America Corporation (NYSE:BAC) has received a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating from 28 brokerages, with 23 advising "Buy" and 5 recommending "Hold." feed.title: Coca‑Cola Stock (NYSE: KO) News Roundup: CEO Transition, Costa Coffee Talks, Analyst Forecasts, and What to Watch When Markets Reopen
feed.summary: This article provides a comprehensive news roundup for Coca-Cola (NYSE: KO), covering key topics such as the upcoming CEO transition to Henrique Braun, ongoing talks regarding the potential sale of Costa Coffee, and the expected $1 billion impairment charge from its Africa bottling stake sale. It also analyzes KO's Q3 2025 financial results, dividend consistency as a "Dividend King," and current analyst forecasts, advising investors on what to monitor as markets reopen.

feed.title: Diamondback Energy (NASDAQ:FANG) Downgraded to Sell Rating by Wall Street Zen
feed.summary: Wall Street Zen downgraded Diamondback Energy (NASDAQ:FANG) from a "hold" to a "sell" rating in a report issued on Saturday, December 27, 2025. Despite this downgrade, the broader consensus among analysts remains a "Buy," with firms like UBS, Scotiabank, and Evercore maintaining positive ratings or raising price targets, leading to a consensus target price of $188.76. The oil and natural gas company recently surpassed quarterly earnings expectations and reported significant revenue growth, though a director recently sold a substantial number of shares.

feed.title: Mosaic to sell Carlsbad Potash Mine for $30 million, exit New Mexico operations
feed.summary: The Mosaic Company is selling its Carlsbad, New Mexico potash mine and related businesses to International Minerals Carlsbad, LLC for $30 million. This strategic move allows Mosaic to exit potash production in New Mexico and focus on its core assets in Saskatchewan, Canada. The deal includes operations, assets, liabilities, and intellectual property, with Mosaic receiving $20 million upfront and $10 million in deferred payments.

feed.title: Waste Management plans to build plant to turn landfill methane into useable natural gas
feed.summary: Waste Management (WM) plans to construct a new renewable natural gas plant at the Denver Arapahoe Disposal Site in Colorado. This project, a partnership with the City of Denver and Arapahoe County, aims to capture 98% of landfill methane, converting it into natural gas capable of powering almost 15,000 homes and WM's trash collection vehicles. The initiative is expected to significantly improve air quality by reducing methane and other harmful pollutants currently flared off.

feed.title: MSFT vs. ORCL: Which Enterprise Cloud & AI Stock Has Better Upside?
feed.summary: Microsoft (MSFT) and Oracle (ORCL) are both significant players in the enterprise cloud and AI sectors, investing heavily in infrastructure. While both reported strong fiscal results, Microsoft is favored as the superior investment due to its diversified business model, consistent revenue growth, and strong AI monetization capabilities. Oracle faces challenges with financing its massive capital expenditures and converting its backlog efficiently.

feed.title: MSCI Stock Surges 6.1% With A 7-day Winning Spree On Recent Analyst Upgrades
feed.summary: MSCI stock has risen 6.1% on the back of recent analyst upgrades, extending a 7-day winning streak. This surge highlights positive market sentiment and potentially increased investor confidence in the company.

feed.title: Lumentum Stock (LITE) Heads Into Year-End Stretch Near $391: AI Optics Momentum, Fresh Wall Street Targets, and What to Watch Next
feed.summary: Lumentum Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ: LITE) is closing out 2025 as a standout AI-infrastructure stock, with its shares trading near $391, driven by strong quarterly results and significant gains of over 370% year-to-date. Wall Street analysts have rapidly raised price targets due to Lumentum's pivotal role in AI and cloud data center optics, despite some concerns about valuation multiples. Investors are now watching for broader market trends, further AI infrastructure spending headlines, and the company's next earnings report in early February 2026.

feed.title: Japan Refunds Overpaid Tax On LogProstyle’s Dividend
feed.summary: LogProstyle Inc., a Japanese real estate and hospitality company, has announced that shareholders are eligible for a refund of overpaid Japanese withholding income tax on a recent cash dividend. This decision follows consultations with Japan’s National Tax Agency, clarifying the tax refund process. Shareholders must complete an application process to receive the refund.

feed.title: Stifel lifts Expeditors (EXPD) target amid emphasis on quality transport names
feed.summary: Stifel has raised its price target for Expeditors International (EXPD) to $123, maintaining a "Hold" rating. This adjustment reflects Stifel's continued focus on quality names within the transport sector, even as they anticipate ongoing challenges for air and ocean freight in the upcoming year. The firm's positive stance highlights Expeditors' strong market position amidst a volatile industry outlook.

feed.title: Levi & Korsinsky Invites Investors to SueWallSt After CarMax, Inc. Stock Collapse
feed.summary: Levi & Korsinsky has announced a class action lawsuit against CarMax, Inc. for alleged securities fraud that impacted investors who lost money between June 20, 2025, and November 5, 2025. Investors affected by the stock collapse are encouraged to contact Levi & Korsinsky to pursue potential claims. The firm, a leading securities litigation specialist, offers a podcast and WhatsApp channel for updates on class action news.

feed.title: Home Depot Stock (HD) Update: Year-End Trading, 2026 Outlook, and What Investors Should Watch Before Monday’s Open

It highlights the company's strategic focus on "Pro" customers, its preliminary guidance versus analysts' expectations, and the critical "Market Recovery Case" for potential upside. Investors are advised to monitor housing data, mortgage rates, and upcoming earnings reports for Home Depot heading into the next trading session.

feed.title: Salesforce (CRM) Stock News Today: Agentforce AI Momentum, Analyst Price Targets, and What to Watch Before Monday’s Open
feed.summary: Salesforce (CRM) shares are hovering around $266, driven by momentum in its Agentforce AI platform and capital return program. The company raised its fiscal 2026 guidance based on accelerating AI product demand, with Agentforce + Data 360 ARR reaching nearly $1.4 billion. Investors are now focused on how this AI adoption translates into sustained, paid growth and wider market sentiment ahead of Monday's market open and into the new year.

feed.title: Merck (MRK) Stock Update: FDA Fast-Track Vouchers, TrumpRx Pricing Deal, and Analyst Targets as Wall Street Heads Into New Year Week
feed.summary: Merck (MRK) shares are gaining momentum heading into the new year, driven by its inclusion in a U.S. drug-pricing deal and new FDA priority vouchers accelerating its drug review timelines. The company is actively diversifying its pipeline beyond Keytruda through acquisitions and new oncology data, aiming to address long-term growth concerns. While analysts anticipate modest upside, the stock's future hinges on successful pipeline execution and navigation of policy risks.

feed.title: Procter & Gamble (PG) Stock Update: Latest Price, News, Analyst Forecasts, and What to Watch Before Monday’s Open
feed.summary: This article provides a comprehensive update on Procter & Gamble (PG) stock, covering its latest price, market performance, and investor considerations heading into the next trading session. It details the challenges of navigating defensive demand versus cautious consumer behavior, the impact of tariffs, and the company's dividend record. The report also includes analyst forecasts and key dates for investors to monitor, such as upcoming earnings and the CEO transition.

feed.title: PepsiCo Stock (NASDAQ: PEP) Update: Elliott Pressure, 2026 Outlook, Dividend Tailwinds—and What to Watch Before Monday’s Open
feed.summary: PepsiCo (NASDAQ: PEP) is facing activist pressure from Elliott Investment Management, driving actions to improve competitiveness in North America through cost cuts, pricing tiers, and product line simplification. The company has reaffirmed its 2025 financial outlook and provided a preliminary positive 2026 outlook. Investors are also monitoring legal headlines regarding alleged pricing inflation with Walmart and the company's consistent dividend increases.

feed.title: Holiday Travel Chaos: JetBlue, Delta, American, United Flights Cancelled As Winter Storm Devin Strikes Northeast US
feed.summary: A powerful winter storm named Devin caused widespread flight cancellations and delays across the Northeast U.S. on Friday, disrupting holiday travel. Thousands of flights were affected, with New York airports experiencing the worst disruptions. Several airlines, including JetBlue, Delta, American, and United, canceled hundreds of flights, and states of emergency were declared in New York and New Jersey.

feed.title: Klarna Group Shareholder Alert: ClaimsFiler Reminds Investors With Losses In Excess Of $100,000 Of Lead Plaintiff Deadline In Class Action Lawsuits Against Klarna Group plc - KLAR
feed.summary: ClaimsFiler is alerting investors with losses exceeding $100,000 in Klarna Group plc (NYSE: KLAR) of a lead plaintiff deadline of February 20, 2026, in a securities class action lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges that Klarna Group and its executives made false and misleading statements and omissions during its September 2025 IPO, particularly regarding the understated risk of increased loss reserves for its "buy now, pay later" loans. Investors are encouraged to visit ClaimsFiler.com for more information and to explore their legal options.

feed.title: NetEase Announces Retirement Of EVP Yingfeng Ding
feed.summary: NetEase Inc. announced that Yingfeng Ding, Executive Vice President and head of the Interactive Entertainment Group, will retire from the company after 23 years of service, effective December 31, 2025. Ding's leadership was crucial in the growth of NetEase's interactive entertainment business. He will continue as a consultant to NetEase in 2026 following his retirement.

feed.title: Stride Shareholder Alert: ClaimsFiler Reminds Investors With Losses In Excess Of $100,000 Of Lead Plaintiff Deadline In Class Action Lawsuits Against Stride, Inc. - LRN

This lawsuit alleges Stride and executives failed to disclose material information, leading to significant stock price drops after reports of fraudulent practices and poor customer experience. Investors who purchased securities between October 22, 2024, and October 28, 2025, may be affected.

feed.title: Wells Fargo Trims Costco (COST) Target Amid Mixed Retail Backdrop

Despite the cautious stance on the broader sector, Costco's membership model and strong renewal rates, especially in the US and Canada, continue to provide earnings visibility and support ongoing growth. The company's expansion plans, including opening 28 new warehouses in fiscal 2026, underline its sustained investment and focus on market durability.
